title: dianthus carthusianorum subsp. tenuifolius
intro: Dianthus carthusianorum subsp. tenuifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved pink or pale pink fringed pink, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dianthus carthusianorum subsp. tenuifolius include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Dianthus carthusianorum subsp. tenuifolius can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of administration to harness its medicinal properties.
